title: Complete test coverage for remaining untested components
description: Adds Vitest + React Testing Library test suites for the final 8 untested components: DigestSection, NewEventFormFields, ManualAddFormCategoryRow, ManualAddFormDateRow, AuthLayout, FormField, SkeletonRow, and SkeletonCalendarCell. This completes 100% test coverage across all components in frontend/src/components/.

userStories.title: DigestSection toggle behavior
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying the digest toggle shows correct labels, reflects aria-checked state, calls onDigestToggle with the toggled value, and disables when pending.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows 'Enabled' label when digestEnabled is true
Shows 'Disabled' label when digestEnabled is false
aria-checked=true when digestEnabled is true
Calls onDigestToggle(!digestEnabled) on click
Switch is disabled when isDigestPending is true

userStories.title: NewEventFormFields renders and calls setters
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying all event form fields render with bound values, setters are called on change, and error message is displayed.
acceptanceCriteria: Event type select is accessible via aria-label
Date input shows bound value
setEventType called on select change with valid option value
setDate called on date input change
formError message rendered when set

userStories.title: ManualAddFormCategoryRow renders and calls setters
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying Remote Status and Company Type selects render with bound values and call their setters on change.
acceptanceCriteria: Remote Status select shows bound value
Company Type select shows bound value
setRemoteStatus called with new value on change
setCompanyType called with new value on change

userStories.title: ManualAddFormDateRow renders and calls setters
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying Date Applied and Compensation inputs render with bound values and call their setters on change.
acceptanceCriteria: Date Applied input shows bound value
Compensation input shows bound value
setDateApplied called with new date on change
setCompensation called with new value on change

userStories.title: AuthLayout renders brand and children
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying AuthLayout renders the Pipelined brand heading and passes children through.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders 'Pipelined' brand heading
Renders children

userStories.title: FormField label association and error display
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying FormField renders its label, associates it with the input, shows error text when present, and omits it when absent.
acceptanceCriteria: Renders label text
Label associates with input via htmlFor
Renders error message when error prop is set
Does not render error element when error is absent

userStories.title: SkeletonRow and SkeletonCalendarCell accessibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I want tests verifying both skeleton components render with their data-testid and aria-hidden=true for accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: SkeletonRow has data-testid='skeleton-row' and aria-hidden=true
SkeletonCalendarCell has data-testid='skeleton-calendar-cell' and aria-hidden=true

rationale: Final sweep to achieve 100% test coverage of all components in frontend/src/components/. All components now have at least one Vitest test suite.
